competitor_changes: embedded client reporting — clients can interact with live data in-portal (white-label)
automated data refresh scheduling (up to 1-minute intervals)
current_tool_status: NexusCRM sync hits API rate limits above 50k records — dashboards stale by up to 4 hours has been reduced to 2 hours due to improved API batching
self-serve embedded reporting for clients now available with 10 report templates
compliance_changes: added PCI-DSS compliance to existing SOC2 Type II and GDPR
notes: Prism BI's self-serve report builder has a steep learning curve — not suitable for occasional users without training
InsightDeck's ML-based anomaly detection still not shipped
